title: Bank The Dividend Yield And Look For Incremental Upside In Regional Banks In 2023
text: 2022 represented a challenging year for the regional banks where their price performance didn't offer a respite vs. the bear market hitting the major indices. The current wall of worry hanging over the banks will be resolved in 2023.

title: KeyCorp: A High Yield And Elevated Economic Risks
text: Economic conditions are worsening, increasing the risk of a prolonged period of high inflation and high rates. Hence, I'm increasingly looking for quality yield. KeyCorp offers a high 4.9% yield backed by a strong business capable of outperformance.

title: INVESTIGATION ALERT: Scott+Scott Attorneys at Law LLP Investigates KeyCorp's Directors and Officers for Breach of Fiduciary Duties – KEY
text: NEW YORK--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Scott+Scott Attorneys at Law LLP (“Scott+Scott”), an international securities and consumer rights litigation firm, is investigating whether certain directors and officers of KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) breached their fiduciary duties to KeyCorp and its shareholders. If you are a KeyCorp shareholder, you may contact attorney Joe Pettigrew for additional information toll-free at 844-818-6982, or jpettigrew@scott-scott.com .

title: KEYCORP RAISES ITS PRIME LENDING RATE TO 7.50 PERCENT
text: CLEVELAND , Dec. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) and its banking affiliates have raised their prime lending rate to 7.50 percent from 7.00 percent, effective tomorrow, December 15, 2022. About KeyCorp KeyCorp's roots trace back nearly 200 years to Albany, New York.
